tasks.title: Implement AcpStatus struct

tasks.title: Implement HandshakeRequest type

tasks.title: Implement HandshakeResponse type
tasks.description: Implement `HandshakeResponse` type for ACP handshake response
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify HandshakeResponse deserialization

tasks.title: Implement ConnectRequest type
tasks.description: Implement `ConnectRequest` type for ACP connection
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ConnectRequest serialization

tasks.impl_notes: Request should contain URL and connection parameters

tasks.title: Implement AckRequest type
tasks.description: Implement `AckRequest` type for ACP acknowledgement
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify AckRequest serialization

tasks.title: Implement AcpMessage type

tasks.title: Implement AcpClient::status() method
tasks.description: Implement `AcpClient::status()` method to get current ACP status
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify status() returns correct status for disconnected state
AddRegressionTest: ensure status reflects actual connection state
tasks.impl_notes: Method should return AcpStatus based on current state

tasks.title: Implement AcpClient::connect() with state transitions
tasks.description: Implement `AcpClient::connect()` method with proper state transitions
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify connect() transitions state from Disconnected to Connecting
AddUnitTest: verify connect() transitions to Connected on success
AddErrorHandlingTest: test connect() handles connection failures
tasks.impl_notes: Must handle state transitions correctly and return errors on failure

tasks.title: Implement AcpClient::handshake() method
tasks.description: Implement `AcpClient::handshake()` method for ACP handshake
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify handshake() sends HandshakeRequest
AddUnitTest: verify handshake() parses HandshakeResponse
AddErrorHandlingTest: test handshake fails when not connected
tasks.impl_notes: Handshake should be called after successful connect

tasks.title: Implement AcpClient::ack() method
tasks.description: Implement `AcpClient::ack()` method for ACP acknowledgement
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ack() sends AckRequest
AddUnitTest: verify ack() returns success response
AddErrorHandlingTest: test ack fails when not connected
tasks.impl_notes: Ack should confirm message receipt

tasks.title: Implement AcpClient::send_message() method
tasks.description: Implement `AcpClient::send_message()` method to send ACP messages
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify send_message() sends message successfully when connected
AddUnitTest: verify send_message() returns error when not connected
AddErrorHandlingTest: test send_message() handles network errors
tasks.impl_notes: Must return error if not in Connected state

tasks.title: Implement AcpClient::disconnect() method
tasks.description: Implement `AcpClient::disconnect()` method to close ACP connection
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify disconnect() transitions state to Disconnected
AddUnitTest: verify disconnect() cleans up resources
AddRegressionTest: ensure disconnect works from any state
tasks.impl_notes: Disconnect should be safe to call from any state

tasks.title: Implement AcpClient::connection_state() method

tasks.title: Implement bus event publishing for acp.disconnected
